name: Teams Conversation Monitor
description: Canonical collaboration-monitoring pack: open Teams, park on a conversation, and capture repeated conversation snapshots for later summarization or decision support.

observationPlan.statusChangeHint: Queue a capture on unread badge changes, conversation focus changes, or message count growth.
observationPlan.notes: Selectors vary across classic Teams and new Teams; treat this as a canonical template and refine with InspectWindow on your machine.

queue.consumerHint: A downstream analyzer can summarize the latest visible conversation state from repeated snapshots.
queue.analysisHint: Use message-thread visual diffs to detect new messages or state transitions before making workflow decisions.
